channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Six countries sanction enablers of settler violence in occupied West Bank
item.description: The Western nations also say they will take further measures if Israel fails to address the situation on the ground.

item.title: Did Netanyahu really ‘defy’ Trump in bombing Iran?
item.description: Experts say the latest confrontation has laid bare growing divisions between the two leaders.

item.title: Deadly protests in Pakistan-administered Kashmir: What’s going on?
item.description: Experts say the current crisis is part of a deeper, long-running debate about governance in the region.

item.title: Modi is using a cannon to kill a cockroach
item.description: A student parody account has rattled India’s most powerful man and exposed just how thin his skin has become.

item.title: Trump says in ‘final throes’ of peace deal but at least 8 killed in Lebanon
item.description: The US president warned Netanyahu he would be on his own if attacks continue after Israel and Iran paused fighting.

item.title: Shackled, bleeding, raped: Palestinians describe abuse in Israel’s prisons
item.description: Former detainees tell Al Jazeera they were routinely sexually abused, starved and attacked by dogs.

item.title: UK government ‘concerned’ by abuse claims against West Ham co-owner
item.description: David Sullivan quit as joint chair of the relegated Premier League club to fight what he said were 'false allegations'.

item.title: Why are Nigeria-South Africa tensions rising amid xenophobic attacks?
item.description: It's not the first time the two African giants have gone head-to-head over attacks on their nationals.

item.title: World Cup opening ceremony: Who’s performing, when it starts, how to watch
item.description: The 2026 World Cup begins with historic ceremonies across the US, Canada and Mexico, launching a record tournament.

item.title: Venezuelans flood capital Caracas streets, demanding free elections
item.description: Venezuelan workers, students and opposition party members marched to the US Embassy in Caracas.

item.title: Mamdani scores goal at World Cup presser
item.description: Footage shows New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani scoring a goal at a World Cup press conference.

item.title: Video captures Russian attack in Ukraine’s Zaporizhzhia
item.description: Surveillance camera video captured the moment a Russian drone strike caused a blast in Zaporizhzhia, Ukraine.

item.title: Italy’s foreign minister slams Israel’s Ben-Gvir over ‘flip-flop’ comments
item.description: The row erupted after Italy said it was investigating the far-right minister over treatment of Gaza flotilla activists.

item.title: New video of great white shark in Mediterranean goes viral
item.description: New video of great white shark in Mediterranean goes viral.

item.title: Israel attacks Tyre in Lebanon, tells all residents to leave
item.description: Israel attacks Tyre in Lebanon, tells all residents to leave

item.title: Trump booed ‘thunderously’ at NBA Finals: What we know
item.description: US President Donald Trump was booed during his appearance at the NBA Finals at Madison Square Garden in New York.

item.title: Hundred days of Israel’s latest war on Lebanon
item.description: Israel's second intensification of its war on Lebanon within two years has reached 100 days, killing thousands.

item.title: ‘Historic’ wave of Palestinian solidarity grows at universities in Germany
item.description: Calls for universities to cut ties with Israeli institutions are rising in the country that condemns the BDS movement.

item.title: Russian attacks kill 5 in Ukraine as Zelenskyy hails talks with US envoys
item.description: Ukraine's president hopes to reinvigorate diplomacy after 'very positive' talks with US envoys and European leaders.

item.title: Are Ronaldo, Messi still the largest World Cup draws, or is Mbappe bigger?
item.description: Has Kylian Mbappe surpassed Cristiano Ronaldo and Lionel Messi as the dominant superstar at the 2026 World Cup?

item.title: Trump courts boos at historic New York NBA Finals appearance
item.description: President Trump's appearance at Madison Square Garden overshadowed by boos, heavy security and political undertones.

item.title: Iran conflict: Why has oil stayed near $100 a barrel?
item.description: The worst-case oil scenario has been avoided, but inflation and slower growth continue to weigh on the global economy.

item.title: Iran says US has revoked World Cup ticket allocation for their supporters
item.description: Iranian players and support staff got US visas and landed in Mexico on Sunday for the World Cup, but now fans in doubt.

item.title: Ranking the Middle East and North African teams at World Cup 2026
item.description: Breaking down the eight Middle East and North African teams' chances at the World Cup in North America.

item.title: Indian crew rescued after attack on oil tanker off Oman
item.description: Indian crew rescued after attack on oil tanker off Oman
